ops.title: Check whether appgroup/ still needs govet unsafeptr disabled
ops.description: .golangci.yml historically attributed the dlsym-data-symbol unsafeptr pattern to both trust/ and appgroup/, but appgroup/ uses purego objc.Send, not raw Dlsym+deref (see ccn note 239201e "darwin FFI"). Verify whether appgroup/ trips govet's unsafeptr at all; if not, scope the disable (and the -unsafeptr=false vet flags in Taskfile.yml + ci.yml — three-config lockstep) as narrowly as the tooling allows, or record why the global disable stays.

ops.text: empirical vet run with unsafeptr enabled over appgroup/ recorded
either the disable is narrowed in all three configs, or a note records why it stays global
